/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_coord_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yura/firstprogram/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
